summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No security-sensitive refs were present, no shared canonical was invented, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or permitted for this shard. Three PRs need maintainer judgment before any advancement; two useful contributor PRs should remain open pending proof/check repair.
